title: Deeply Savory Italian Lamb Pasta
description: A hearty Italian dish featuring lamb stock and air-fried lamb, served with pasta and a blend of Italian seasonings, this recipe is shojin-friendly and perfect for a rainy day.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large bowl, whisk together the lamb stock, olive oil, garlic, Italian seasoning, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb pieces to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Remove the lamb from the marinade and cook in the air fryer for 10-12 minutes, or until browned and cooked through.
Drain the pasta and add it to the bowl with the lamb stock mixture.
Toss the pasta in the lamb stock mixture until well coated.
Serve the pasta hot, topped with the air-fried lamb and grated parmesan.
Garnish with fresh parsley or basil, if desired.
